prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别约2458→2251→10779→9609→1810名。2021–2022年稳定在2200–2500名区间，2023–2024年因宏福校区/海南办学点单独招生导致位 次大幅后移至9600–10800名；2025年云南省高考改革为物理类，仅统计普通类，最低位次回升至约1810名，较2024年普通类（约2118名）前移约300名，显示该校在云南物理类考 生中竞争热度显著回升；该校在云南省招生计划持续扩增：2021年47人→2022年47人→2023年49人→2024年52人→2025年55人→2026年63人，2026年较202 5年扩招8人（+14.5%），扩招幅度为近年最大，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年54名→2022年62名→2023年5 7名→2024年63名→2025年60名→2026年50名，首次进入全国前50名，学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升，对高分考生吸引力增强；2021–2026年声誉文件中均未出现北 京邮电大学的负面舆情记录，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第64位（综合热度约47.9万），评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异 常记录中亦无该校断档记录，报考心理预期稳定；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-、 光学工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，在信息科技领域学科实力突出，与当前社会热门专业方向高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年热度评估为"高热推 荐"，较2023年小幅升温；计算机类2024年评估为"推荐"，虽较2023年峰值有所降温但仍属偏热。该校核心招生专业均处于社会高热度 领域，对考生吸引力强。云南省2025年物理类考生约17.3万人，2026年总考生37.79万人，按近年物理类占比约60.6%估算，2026年物理类考生约22.9万人，较2025年增加约32%， 考生规模大幅增长将加剧竞争。2026年；北京邮电大学位于北京市，对云南考生属跨省报考，无本省招生倾斜；该校在全国各省招 生分布较均衡，云南招生占比约1%–2%，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约1810名、2026年扩招14.5%（位次后移约158名）、软科排名首次进入前5 0（位次前移动力）、物理类考生大幅增长约32%（竞争加剧）、核心专业社会热度持续偏高（吸引力增强）等多重因素，结合考生规模激增与排名上升 的相互抵消效应，预测2026年最低位次约1990名，较2025年小幅后移约180名；波动区间1691–2289名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1990名，区间1691–2289名。位次在区间下限（1691名）以内可重点冲刺一档元班专业（计算机类/电子信息类元班）；位次在区间中段（约1990名）建议以二档通信 工程、计算机类为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（2289名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对友好的专业。北邮信息与通信工程A+为全国顶尖，通 信工程大类招生名额最多（14人），是性价比较高的核心选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 2458 → 2251 → 10779 → 9609 → 1810. In 2021–2022, it stabilized in the 2200–2500 range; in 2023–2024, due to separate enrollment at Hongfu Campus/Hainan Campus, the ranking dropped significantly to 9600–10800; in 2025, Yunnan's college entrance exam reform introduced the Physics Category, counting only regular classes, and the minimum ranking rebounded to about 1810, moving forward about 300 places compared to 2024's regular class (about 2118), indicating a significant recovery in competition among Physics Category candidates in Yunnan. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan has been continuously expanding: 2021: 47 → 2022: 47 → 2023: 49 → 2024: 52 → 2025: 55 → 2026: 63, with an increase of 8 students (+14.5%) in 2026 compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which will push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been rising: 2021: 54th → 2022: 62nd → 2023: 57th → 2024: 63rd → 2025: 60th → 2026: 50th, entering the national top 50 for the first time, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing appeal to high-scoring candidates. From 2021 to 2026, no negative public opinion records of Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications appeared in reputation documents, indicating stable reputation. Douyin popularity ranking: 64th (comprehensive popularity about 479,000), rated as "average," with short video exposure at a moderate level, showing no significant signal of increased application attention. There are no records of historical admission anomalies for this university, so application psychological expectations are stable. Information and Communication Engineering A+ (national top), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding disciplinary strength in the information technology field, highly aligned with current popular social majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors was assessed as "highly recommended," slightly warming compared to 2023; Computer majors were assessed as "recommended" in 2024, though cooling from the 2023 peak, still relatively hot. The university's core enrollment majors are all in high-demand social fields, strongly attracting candidates. In 2025, Yunnan Province had about 173,000 Physics Category candidates; in 2026, total candidates are 377,900. Estimating Physics Category proportion at about 60.6% in recent years, 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 229,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025, significantly intensifying competition. In 2026, Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, so for Yunnan candidates, it is a cross-province application with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment distribution across provinces is relatively balanced, with Yunnan's enrollment share about 1%–2%, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 1810, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 14.5% (ranking backward by about 158 places), the Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time (ranking forward momentum), the significant increase in Physics Category candidates by about 32% (intensified competition), and the persistently high social popularity of core majors (enhanced appeal), combined with the offsetting effects of candidate surge and ranking rise, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1990, slightly backward by about 180 places from 2025; fluctuation range: 1691–2289.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1990, range 1691–2289. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (1691) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors (Computer Class/Electronic Information Class Yuan Class); those with rankings in the middle (about 1990) are advised to target Tier 2 Communication Engineering and Computer Class as main directions, while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; those with rankings near the upper limit (2289) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications' Information and Communication Engineering A+ is nationally top, and Communication Engineering major enrollment has the most slots (14), making it a cost-effective core choice.
